title: NAT
overview: NAT is a technique that maps many private IP addresses to one (or a few) public IP address(es), conserving scarce IPv4 space and providing a rudimentary layer of address hiding.

study.overview: NAT is a technique that maps many private IP addresses to one (or a few) public IP address(es), conserving scarce IPv4 space and providing a rudimentary layer of address hiding.
